export interface PostComment {
    id?: number | undefined;
    parentId?: number | undefined;
    userId?: number | undefined;
    type?: PostCommentType | undefined;
    replyCount?: number | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
    status?: PostCommentStatus | undefined;
    createdAt?: number | undefined;
    updatedAt?: number | undefined;
    deletedAt?: number | undefined;
    avatarUrl?: string | undefined;
    username?: string | undefined;
    size?: number | undefined;
    repliedId?: number | undefined;
    parentComment?: PostComment | undefined;
    repliedComment?: PostComment | undefined;
    Lang?: PostUserLocale | undefined;
    /** post comment */
    PostId?: number | undefined;
    Nickname?: string | undefined;
    customAvatarUrl?: string | undefined;
    beautifiedAvatarUrl?: string | undefined;
}
export interface CreatePostCommentRequest {
    postId?: number | undefined;
    parentId?: number | undefined;
    replyId?: number | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
    type?: PostCommentType | undefined;
    /** 可以用来模拟评论，当这个id > 0的时候，会优先使用这个id进行评论 */
    fakeUserId?: number | undefined;
    /**
     * 模拟延迟时间，注意此处配置是sec，当前时间+延迟的分钟数据
     * eg： 60s， 等于 now() +60s 后执行
     */
    fakeDelayTimeSec?: number | undefined;
}
export interface CreatePostCommentResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    comment?: PostComment | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
}

}

}

/** Post 包含了帖子的全部信息，以及与帖子相关的用户信息和 PostUrlInfo（如果存在） */
export interface Post {
    id?: number | undefined;
    authorId?: number | undefined;
    likeCount?: number | undefined;
    pictures?: PostPictureInQuery[] | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
    isLiked?: boolean | undefined;
    authorAvatar?: string | undefined;
    authorName?: string | undefined;
    score?: number | undefined;
    isPinned?: boolean | undefined;
    commentCount?: number | undefined;
    bannedAt?: number | undefined;
    deletedAt?: number | undefined;
    createdAt?: number | undefined;
    partialBannedAt?: number | undefined;
    /**
     * FIXME
     * because in database schema, the column name is `user_id`,
     * there is a compatibility issue while mapping to `author_id` in CacheProvider.get()
     */
    userId?: number | undefined;
    isDigitalHuman?: boolean | undefined;
    botId?: string | undefined;
}
/** CreatePost */
export interface CreatePostRequest {
    clientToken?: string | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
    pictures?: PostPicture[] | undefined;
    /** 仅自己可见，true -> 只有自己能见到 */
    isPrivate?: boolean | undefined;
}

    name?: string | undefined;
    file?: Uint8Array | undefined;
}

}
